findings.summary: No datasheets directory found and no BOM parts have MPNs. Review is a consistency check only — manufacturer specs cannot be verified.
findings.recommendation: Before reporting 'verified' findings, (1) populate the MPN field on BOM parts, (2) run the datasheet sync skill (digikey, mouser, lcsc, or element14) to download PDFs into ./datasheets/, then re-run analysis. If datasheets are unreachable, state every pin-level and electrical claim as 'per symbol/library' (consistency), not 'verified against datasheet' (correctness).

report_context.impact: Report wording must avoid 'verified' / 'datasheet-confirmed' language for every BOM part — none have manufacturer evidence attached.

findings.summary: Transistor-driven LED: Q1 driving D5, D6, D8, D7
findings.description: Transistor Q1 (AO3400A) drives LED(s) D5, D6, D8, D7 without current sense resistor.
findings.recommendation: Consider adding a current sense resistor for LED current regulation.

findings.summary: Regulator U4 LDO
findings.description: Power regulator (LDO) detected

findings.summary: VBUS has no declared source
findings.description: Net VBUS carries power_in pins but has no power_out pin, no PWR_FLAG, no regulator output mapping, and no bridged solder jumper path to a sourced net.
findings.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.

report_context.impact: Rail has no source visible to the analyser; likely a wiring gap or missing PWR_FLAG.

findings.summary: Sourcing blocker: BOM has <50% MPN coverage (0/24 unique parts). Board is not pre-fab ready.
findings.description: Sourcing audit: 0 of 24 unique BOM lines (grouped by value + footprint) carry a manufacturer part number (0.0%). Pre-fab readiness requires 100% coverage; production assembly requires all parts sourceable via one of the supported distributors.
findings.recommendation: Populate the MPN field on the listed refs (use the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill to search by value/footprint when the MPN isn't already known).

report_context.impact: Pre-fab gate: board cannot be ordered until MPN coverage reaches 100%.

findings.summary: Transistor Q1 mosfet
findings.description: Transistor circuit (mosfet) detected

findings.summary: Net /0c2041eb-daed-4eed-ade6-f8635714311d/QSPI_SCLK: 3.3V / 1.1V domain crossing without level shifter
findings.description: Net /0c2041eb-daed-4eed-ade6-f8635714311d/QSPI_SCLK connects ICs in 3.3V and 1.1V domains. The 3.3V output may exceed the 1.1V input absolute maximum rating of 2.0V, risking damage.
findings.recommendation: Add a level shifter between the 3.3V and 1.1V domains on net /0c2041eb-daed-4eed-ade6-f8635714311d/QSPI_SCLK, or verify that the connected ICs have tolerant inputs.

report_context.impact: Risk of damage or unreliable logic levels

top_issues.summary: No datasheets directory found and no BOM parts have MPNs. Review is a consistency check only — manufacturer specs cannot be verified.
top_issues.recommendation: Before reporting 'verified' findings, (1) populate the MPN field on BOM parts, (2) run the datasheet sync skill (digikey, mouser, lcsc, or element14) to download PDFs into ./datasheets/, then re-run analysis. If datasheets are unreachable, state every pin-level and electrical claim as 'per symbol/library' (consistency), not 'verified against datasheet' (correctness).

report_context.impact: Report wording must avoid 'verified' / 'datasheet-confirmed' language for every BOM part — none have manufacturer evidence attached.

top_issues.summary: Sourcing blocker: BOM has <50% MPN coverage (0/24 unique parts). Board is not pre-fab ready.
top_issues.description: Sourcing audit: 0 of 24 unique BOM lines (grouped by value + footprint) carry a manufacturer part number (0.0%). Pre-fab readiness requires 100% coverage; production assembly requires all parts sourceable via one of the supported distributors.
top_issues.recommendation: Populate the MPN field on the listed refs (use the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill to search by value/footprint when the MPN isn't already known).

report_context.impact: Pre-fab gate: board cannot be ordered until MPN coverage reaches 100%.

top_issues.summary: Net /0c2041eb-daed-4eed-ade6-f8635714311d/QSPI_SCLK: 3.3V / 1.1V domain crossing without level shifter
top_issues.description: Net /0c2041eb-daed-4eed-ade6-f8635714311d/QSPI_SCLK connects ICs in 3.3V and 1.1V domains. The 3.3V output may exceed the 1.1V input absolute maximum rating of 2.0V, risking damage.
top_issues.recommendation: Add a level shifter between the 3.3V and 1.1V domains on net /0c2041eb-daed-4eed-ade6-f8635714311d/QSPI_SCLK, or verify that the connected ICs have tolerant inputs.

report_context.impact: Risk of damage or unreliable logic levels
